title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic Skill Creator, BuildPartner, Morph, and Codeburn. The plugins extend Claude with web scraping, model swapping, token spend tracking, and media generation to accelerate development workflows.
